  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ProfitManagementConfig
    Profit management configuration: scale-out plan and final take-profit settings.
    ScaleOutTrancheConfig
    A single tranche in the scale-out plan: defines when to sell a fraction of the position.
    TakeProfitConfig
    Final take-profit configuration: triggers a full position exit when the gain target is reached.
    TriggerConfig
    Reusable trigger definition: specifies the type, threshold value, and price reference for triggering an event.
